purpose: The project's own architecture, documented: (1) the investment-lifecycle measurement schema -- which official data source measures which gate of a project's life from announcement to trade outcome, and where each source goes blind; (2) the full data-sourcing inventory with owners, access methods, and the bulletins each source feeds; (3) the working method -- how a research question becomes a verified bulletin, then derived outputs, then a maintained quarterly artifact. This is the map for anyone extending or refreshing the repo.

investment_lifecycle_gates.measured_by: Press, state investment summits, PIB events
investment_lifecycle_gates.reliability: Lowest -- announcements routinely never materialize (RRPCL stuck at MoU for years). This repo treats announcements as claims to verify, never as data.
investment_lifecycle_gates.blind_spot: Everything; no official series tracks announcement-to-reality conversion.

investment_lifecycle_gates.measured_by: DPIIT IEM Part A -- Annual Report Appendices III/IV (state-wise, sector-wise)
investment_lifecycle_gates.reliability: Official, but intent only. Rs 28.4 lakh cr proposed 2021-2025. Threshold Rs 125cr P&M (from Apr 2025); manufacturing only; capital-source-blind (domestic + foreign combined).
investment_lifecycle_gates.blind_spot: No size band published; monthly series dead post-NSWS; 1951 taxonomy has no Electronics category.

investment_lifecycle_gates.measured_by: PARIVESH 2.0 open JSON API -- full national EC register (113,804 proposals, SEIAA included), extracted 19-Jul-2026
investment_lifecycle_gates.reliability: NOW LIVE in this repo: 3,407 industrial ECs granted from 2022+ cohorts, flow accelerating (198 -> 734 -> 1,102/yr); ToR-granted = deepest forward signal. The most refresh-friendly source in the stack (one API call).
investment_lifecycle_gates.blind_spot: EC categories don't map 1:1 to IEM industries; electronics/battery plants have no EC category of their own; no grant date in bulk record; one EC != one IEM-scale project.

investment_lifecycle_gates.measured_by: DPIIT IEM Part B -- Appendices V/VI. Rs 19.52 lakh cr implemented 2021-2025; implementation ratio hit 109.9% in 2025
investment_lifecycle_gates.reliability: The best implementation series that exists -- and capital-source-blind, which makes it the right domestic+foreign combined measure.
investment_lifecycle_gates.blind_spot: No state-x-sector cross-tab; partial-year figures revise by lakh-crores; services excluded.

investment_lifecycle_gates.measured_by: PIB Parliament-answer releases (PRIDs), Lok Sabha/Rajya Sabha written replies, ministry annual reports, PRS budget-actuals
investment_lifecycle_gates.reliability: Fragmented but reconstructable: Rs 28,748cr total at 31 Dec 2025; per-scheme figures assembled from 4+ source types in the report card.
investment_lifecycle_gates.blind_spot: No consolidated per-scheme disbursal table is published anywhere; two schemes' zeros mean opposite things (Solar by design, ACC by failure).

investment_lifecycle_gates.measured_by: DPIIT quarterly factsheets + FDI newsletters (sector/state/country tables); RBI for reinvested-earnings basis
investment_lifecycle_gates.reliability: The only foreign-capital register -- $58.85bn equity FY26. But it measures FUNDING SOURCE, not activity.
investment_lifecycle_gates.blind_spot: State attribution by registered office (Jio/Gujarat proof); domestic capital structurally invisible (Assam $2.37M vs Rs 27,000cr project); no methodology documentation by DPIIT's own admission.

investment_lifecycle_gates.measured_by: TRADESTAT chapter tables (FY values + growth); Exim Bank/MOCI aggregates as independent cross-check
investment_lifecycle_gates.reliability: Solid at chapter level; deficit figures cross-validated within 0.3% across chains.
investment_lifecycle_gates.blind_spot: Chapter level cannot separate scheme-caused from macro-caused moves -- which is why the verdicts carry named confounders.

data_source_inventory.feeds: FDI-vs-PLI bulletin, verdict re-run, state tables
data_source_inventory.access: dpiit.gov.in publications page (JS SPA -- read in rendered browser; PDFs direct-fetch with browser UA)

data_source_inventory.measures: IEM Part A intent + Part B implementation (gates 2, 4)
data_source_inventory.feeds: State implementation table, IEM record grade, policy dashboard
data_source_inventory.access: Annual Report PDF; layout-preserving extraction, verify against Grand Total rows

data_source_inventory.feeds: PLI report card, policy dashboard, companies ledger
data_source_inventory.access: curl with browser UA + redirects; cite PRID always; sector releases carry company names, cross-scheme roundups do not

data_source_inventory.source: Lok Sabha / Rajya Sabha written replies
data_source_inventory.measures: Scheme-level figures ministries do not publish on their own sites (gate 5)
data_source_inventory.feeds: Report card gap-fills (MedDev Rs 157cr, Solar zero-by-design, Telecom actuals)
data_source_inventory.access: sansad.in PDFs via r.jina.ai proxy with ?source=pqars suffix; ministry sites often mirror; PIB summarizes with PRIDs

data_source_inventory.owner: MeitY, Steel, MHI, DoP, DPIIT, Textiles, DCPC, MoCA, MoD
data_source_inventory.access: Direct PDFs; challenges live in annual reports and Standing Committee replies, never on scheme pages

data_source_inventory.measures: The ministry's own sworn admissions (fund surrenders, underutilization)
data_source_inventory.feeds: Dashboard challenge quotes (Semicon 23%/9% utilization; ACC 'massive disconnect')
data_source_inventory.access: sansad.in when TLS cooperates; the strongest primary source in the stack

data_source_inventory.measures: Imports/exports by HS chapter, values + growth (gate 7)
data_source_inventory.feeds: Trade bulletins, growth-vs-volume analysis, action items
data_source_inventory.access: Extracted in the descriptive companion repo

data_source_inventory.measures: Independent trade/FDI aggregates + sector credit growth

data_source_inventory.source: RBI / bank MCLR pages / bond data
data_source_inventory.access: RBI via PIB mirrors (rbi.org.in blocks automation); bank .bank.in rate pages
icra.in press-release PDFs -- ALWAYS verify against the PDF (one fabricated claim was caught and retracted)

data_source_inventory.feeds: Dashboard negative-result section (zero priority-sector coverage; useful for hub-enabling infrastructure only)

data_source_inventory.measures: The transparency benchmark: nightly funnel-complete scheme dashboard
data_source_inventory.access: Public Power BI embed, no login

data_source_inventory.feeds: EC pipeline bulletin; lifecycle schema gate 3
data_source_inventory.access: OPEN JSON API (advanceSearchData) -- full register in one unauthenticated call, SEIAA included

working_method.name: Frame the checkable question
working_method.practice: Every bulletin starts as a falsifiable question (did FDI rise after launch? is the incentive actually paid?) -- not a topic. The three-numbers rule: never conflate FDI inflow, committed investment, and disbursal.

working_method.name: Parallel primary-source research
working_method.practice: Fan out background agents per ministry/source with explicit instructions: primary over PIB, PIB over press; cite document+date+ID; flag gaps rather than estimate; known access workarounds included in the brief.

working_method.name: Verify before publishing
working_method.practice: Extract with layout preservation and check against the document's own Grand Total rows; cross-validate independent chains (repo deficit vs Exim within 0.3%); when an automated pass fabricates (ICRA steel), catch it against the source PDF and retract IN THE PUBLISHED BULLETIN.

working_method.name: Data JSON first, chart second
working_method.practice: Every bulletin is a sourced data JSON (data/) plus a chart page (charts/) in one design-token system; the JSON is the citable artifact, listed in repo_manifest and consumable by the report synthesizer.

working_method.name: State the judgment, show the evidence
working_method.practice: Grades and traffic lights are declared judgments with criteria; every row carries checkable evidence; revisions are displayed (A- -> B), never silently applied; confounders and negative results are published (MoSPI/IEM 'does not fit' sections).

working_method.name: Derive, don't duplicate
working_method.practice: The master report JSON is the source of truth; the 22-slide deck, dashboards, PDF snapshots, and Word docs regenerate from data via the synthesizer and build_deck.sh pipeline. Templates in templates/ encode the formats.

working_method.name: Maintain on a cadence
working_method.practice: GitHub Actions quarterly workflow regenerates the tracked PDF snapshot and opens a re-verification issue from the ministry-by-ministry checklist; new dated data files supersede rather than overwrite; the manifest keeps everything enumerable.

known_failure_modes: Gov sites block automation inconsistently: 403s (PIB, meity, texmin -- browser UA fixes), TLS drops (sansad, pharma-dept, dot, mnre -- r.jina.ai route), dead SPAs (old SIA statistics), dead domains (pharmaceuticals.gov.in).
Official numbers disagree with themselves: PIB outlay Rs 1.91 vs 1.97 lakh cr; DAHD vs Cabinet AHIDF outlay; DPIIT appendix headers Dec-vs-Nov over identical totals. Flag, never reconcile silently.
Partial-year figures revise massively (IEM 2024 Part B grew Rs ~2 lakh cr between reports).
Two zeros can mean opposite things (Solar by design vs ACC by failure) -- always read the mechanism, not just the number.
Session limits kill background agents mid-run -- relaunch with the prior attempt's partial lesson folded into the brief.
